vocab.meaning: một sự may mắn bất ngờ
vocab.example: It was a stroke of luck to receive such a high-end watch just as my old one stopped working.

vocab.meaning: sự sang trọng kín đáo (không phô trương)
vocab.example: The watch I was gifted exudes understated luxury, making it perfect for both formal and casual settings.

vocab.meaning: gợi lên cảm giác trưởng thành
vocab.example: Wearing the formal watch my father gave me always seems to evoke a sense of maturity during business meetings.

vocab.meaning: để lại một di sản/truyền thống
vocab.example: My grandmother decided to bequeath a legacy to me in the form of her vintage gold wristwatch.

vocab.meaning: một món đồ kỷ niệm (vật phẩm lưu niệm)
vocab.example: I view this watch not just as a tool, but as a commemorative piece of my time studying abroad.
I was gifted a diver's watch known for its sturdy construction, which is ideal for my outdoor hobbies.
Even though it's not the most expensive item I own, that watch remains a very dear personal memento.

vocab.meaning: sự tìm thấy đầy bất ngờ và may mắn
vocab.example: My partner said the vintage watch they gave me was a serendipitous find in a small boutique in Paris.

vocab.meaning: vẻ đẹp lôi cuốn trường tồn với thời gian
vocab.example: The watch has a timeless appeal that ensures it will never go out of fashion, regardless of current trends.

vocab.meaning: người bạn đồng hành luôn có mặt
vocab.example: Since that birthday, the watch has been my constant companion through every major event in my life.
